title: Unctuous Mustard Cornish Amaretti Pudding
description: A comforting, egg-free British sponge pudding with a bouncy texture, combining sharp English mustard, crushed amaretti, and sweet boiled candies.

ingredients.name: Golden syrup
ingredients.notes: For the base of the basin

instructions: Grease a 1-litre pudding basin thoroughly with butter and pour the golden syrup into the bottom.
Whisk the flour, mustard powder, and sugar together in a large mixing bowl until well combined.
Stir in the melted butter and milk gradually to create a smooth, bouncy batter.
Fold the crushed amaretti biscuits and candy shards into the mixture gently.
Spoon the batter into the prepared basin and level the top with a spatula.
Cover the basin with a pleated layer of parchment paper and foil, securing it tightly with kitchen string.
Place the basin in a large pot with boiling water reaching halfway up the sides.
Steam the pudding over low heat for ninety minutes ensuring the pot does not boil dry.
Carefully remove the basin and let it stand for five minutes before inverting onto a plate.
Serve the warm pudding with a side of thick Cornish clotted cream.
